cartPage.title: My Cart
cartPage.deleteItemTitle: Delete this item from your cart?
cartPage.deleteItemDescription: This action will remove the selected item from your cart. You can add it again anytime if needed.
cartPage.removeAllTitle: Remove all items from your cart?
cartPage.removeAllDescription: This action will clear your cart completely. You can add items again anytime.
cartPage.note: Shipping fees and discounts are calculated at checkout.
cartPage.emptyDescription: Looks like your cart is empty. Start browsing our products and add items to your cart to begin your order. You can also explore the recommended products below to quickly find items you might like.
cartPage.discoverMore: Discover more products you might like.
